message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

class BattlerOrder
class TurnSystem
class BattleFlow
class BattleContext
class PlayerMainTactics
class Player
class PassiveProperty
class ActiveTargetResult
class InvocationContext
class ITargetable
class TargetSelection
class AiInvocationContext
class TurnContext
class TP
class Attribute
class Tolerance
class HP
class MP
class PassiveEffect
class ActiveEffect
class Ability
class PassiveEffectManager
class BattleEventHandler
class ActiveTargetFilter
class Battler
class BattleEvent
class ActiveProperty
class VisualEffectContext
class ActiveTargetRange
class VisualEffect

TurnSystem --> BattlerOrder
BattleFlow --> TurnSystem
BattleContext --> BattleFlow
BattleContext o-- Player
Player o-- PlayerMainTactics
Player "PartySkill" o-- PassiveProperty

PassiveProperty o-- TP
PassiveProperty o-- Attribute
PassiveProperty o-- Tolerance
PassiveProperty o-- HP
PassiveProperty o-- MP

Battler --> ITargetable
Battler --> TargetSelection
Battler --> AiInvocationContext
Battler --> TurnContext
Battler --> Ability
Battler --> PassiveEffectManager
Battler --> BattleEventHandler
Battler --> BattleContext

TargetSelection --> ActiveTargetResult
AiInvocationContext --> InvocationContext
TargetSelection --> InvocationContext

Ability "PassiveSkill" --> PassiveProperty
Ability --> TP
Ability --> Attribute
Ability --> Tolerance
Ability --> HP
Ability --> MP
Ability --> PassiveEffect
Ability --> ActiveEffect

PassiveEffect --> BattleEvent
ActiveEffect --> BattleEvent

ActiveEffect --> ActiveTargetRange
ActiveEffect --> VisualEffect

ActiveTargetRange --> ActiveProperty
VisualEffect --> ActiveProperty

ActiveProperty "ActiveEffect?" --> ActiveEffect

BattleEventHandler --> BattleEvent

ActiveTargetFilter --> ActiveEffect

VisualEffectContext --> ActiveProperty

PassiveEffectManager --> PassiveEffect

@enduml
```
